Subscribe

Monthly AI research and project updates, with RSS available now.

/ Owned channel

Subscribe for monthly AI research/project updates.

Email provider automation is still intentionally simple: send a subscribe request by email, or use RSS as the instant self-serve feed for notes, flagship essays, and future deep dives.

Subscribe by email Subscribe by RSS Start here Read the flagship essay

What you get

  • Paper-backed AI research essays with source trails, mechanisms, experiments, and open questions.
  • Project updates across AI engineering, agents, algorithms, systems, and software engineering.
  • A low-noise cadence built around one substantial monthly update.

/ Site map

Static notes, research trails, projects, writing, and contact routes for rigorous computer science reading.
